response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-adjacent technologies, plus strong architectural and open-source contributions, but his resume lacks clear evidence of direct experience with Nest.js, AWS services like RDS/EKS, or renewable energy/construction tech domains, and his German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience across React, Node.js, and REST APIs
Proven open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple tooling projects
Demonstrated ability to learn and adapt across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, PostgreSQL, or AWS services like RDS/S3 in experience
German language skill is only basic, conflicting with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
Resume lists 15+ roles over 15 years, raising questions about depth, focus, and recent relevance
